title: Spicy Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Chinese-inspired dish featuring fried rice with intense, spicy, and savory ingredients.

ingredients.name: Intense mustardy sauce (hot mustard and soy sauce mix)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped tomatoes and cook until they start to soften.
Add the cooked rice to the wok or skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir in the intense mustardy sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is well coated.
Add the fried shallots (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the Spicy Fried Rice to a serving platter and serve immediately.
